examples: The slurry pump of the set can also be used in irrigation and drainage , delivering excrement, and the suction of sand, as well as other thickened and dreggy liquids.
The traditional method to deal with the coke plant wastewater is a means using by the active dreggy mud, which has less effect on the hard-degraded substance and ammoniacal nitrogen.
Therefore, the original passive mode that the deodorization is processed by spices is completely changed, in other words, an active mode that the dreggy gas is directly exhausted is applied.
